pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer pairs MLP3.5x LeakyReLU^2 with SmearGate, Bigram/Trigram hashing, Value Residual, gated/XSA attention, partial RoPE, and late QAT/int6 stack.
techniques: MLP3.5x + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 with SmearGate + hash features
Value Residual + gated/XSA attention plus partial RoPE
Late QAT with int6 GPTQ-lite quant & sliding-window eval
